name: AXT INC
business: AXT is a worldwide materials science company that develops and produces high-performance compound and single element semiconductor substrates, also known as wafers. The company has two product lines: specialty material substrates (indium phosphide, gallium arsenide, germanium) and raw materials (purified gallium, pBN crucibles, boron oxide, etc.). Customers include epitaxial layer companies, semiconductor device manufacturers, LED manufacturers, solar cell manufacturers, and research organizations, primarily in Asia, the United States, and Europe.
namedSuppliers: Beijing BoYu Semiconductor Vessel Craftwork Technology Co., Ltd.

exposures.sentence: We believe the growth of AI applications is increasing the need for high-speed data transfer, which may enable a growing increase in InP substrate demand for such data centers.
InP is a high-performance semiconductor wafer substrate used in broadband and fiber optic applications, 5G infrastructure and data center connectivity.
Data centers use InP devices for high-speed optical data transmission.
AXT is a worldwide materials science company that develops and produces high-performance compound and single element semiconductor substrates, also known as wafers.

Semi-insulating GaAs substrates are used to create various high-speed microwave components, including power amplifier chips used in cell phones, satellite communications and broadcast television applications.
GaAs wafers could also be used for making vertical cavity surface emitting lasers (VCSELs) for facial recognition.

Semi-conducting GaAs substrates are used to create opto-electronic products, such as light emitting diodes (LEDs) that are used in a wide range of applications including automotive lighting, horticulture, signage, display, sensors and machine vision.
Semi-conducting GaAs substrates are also used in making industrial lasers.
Ge substrates are used in applications such as solar cells for space and terrestrial photovoltaic applications.

catalysts.event: Received initial export permits for indium phosphide to Europe and Japan
catalysts.sentence: On June 11, 2025, Tongmei was informed that it had satisfied the applicable requirements for a permit to export indium phosphide and received its initial export permits from the Ministry of Commerce of the People’s Republic of China to resume shipping indium phosphide substrates to certain customers in Europe and Japan.
On December 29, 2025, we completed an offering on the Nasdaq and raised gross proceeds of approximately $100 million.

catalysts.event: Tongmei expects to complete STAR Market IPO
catalysts.sentence: Tongmei hopes to accomplish this goal in the coming months.
